descriptions: Added `Config.Billings.codemBillingV2` to configuration and integrated support for mBilling v2 (`codem-billingv2`) in `EDITABLE.CreateBilling`
Added `Config.Dispatch.Integration.frkn_police_dispatch` to configuration and implemented server-side event listeners for `frkn-police-job` dispatch alerts
Added `Config.Dispatch.Integration._0r_dispatch` to configuration and implemented server-side event listeners for `0r-dispatch` alerts
